---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a component, improvement, or idea
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What are you trying to do?

Describe the problem or use case this would solve.

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. If it's a new component, describe its behavior and states.

## Alternatives

Any workarounds or alternatives you've considered.

## Additional context

Links, screenshots, or references to similar work.
